channel.title: LLM Timeline — JHU Models
channel.description: Large Language Model releases from JHU.

item.title: mmBERT (JHU)
item.description: Parameters: mmBERT License: open Type: model "a modern multilingual encoder trained on 3T tokens and 1833 languages. We introduce several novel elements in training: an inverse masking schedule and a cascading annealed language learning schedule for multilingual data" Announce: https://huggingface.co/blog/mmbert
